历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 2228, serving as the baseline ranking in recent years; the enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for Physics Category: 2 students in 2025, increasing to 4 students in 2026, an expansion of 100%, significantly easing competition pressure, and the ranking number is expected to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University (including Zhuhai Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; it ranks approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top-tier normal universities nationwide, with an extremely high level; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving university management response incidents, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high, and application attention is stable; Beijing Normal University has 18 A- and above disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Education A+, Psychology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Mathematics A, Geography A+, etc., and the Zhuhai Campus shares the parent university's disciplinary resources, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors enrolled in Physics Category (Mathematics, Science Experimental Class) correspond to basic disciplines such as Mathematics, Physics, and Biology, with moderate and stable social popularity; the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province in 2026 is approximately 200,000, significantly increasing compared to 143,000 in the Physics Category in 2025, intensifying overall competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 367 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; the main campus of Beijing Normal University is in Beijing, and the Zhuhai Campus is in Guangdong, not a local university, with no local enrollment preference; candidates in Liaoning Province have a strong willingness to apply for 985 universities outside the province, with regional factors having a neutral impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the doubling of the enrollment plan for Physics Category in 2026 (2 to 4 students), the increase in the total number of candidates in Liaoning Province, the top-tier level of the university, and stable reputation: the expansion significantly alleviates competition, but the expansion of the candidate base partially offsets the expansion effect, and the ranking is expected to move backward significantly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3595, with a range of 3185–4005.
